hero.title: Product Re-light

steps.title: Upload your existing product image
steps.description: Start with any product photo, even those shot in poor lighting conditions or with uneven shadows.

steps.title: Choose lighting style and intensity
steps.description: Pick soft studio, dramatic spotlight, daylight, or custom lighting presets.

steps.title: AI re-lights your product photo
steps.description: Automatically adjusts highlights, shadows, and reflections with correct direction and mood.

steps.title: Review and export for listings and ads
steps.description: Download high-resolution, re-lit images for Amazon, Shopify, and paid ads.

items.question: What is Product Re-light?
items.answer: An AI workflow that fixes and enhances product photo lighting for studio-quality results without reshooting.

items.question: Who should use this?
items.answer: E-commerce brands, marketplace sellers, photographers, and design teams that need consistent lighting across catalogs.

items.question: What inputs are required?
items.answer: Upload any product image and choose your preferred lighting style and intensity.

items.question: What outputs will I get?
items.answer: High-resolution product images with improved lighting suitable for listings and ads.

items.question: Can I pick different lighting moods?
items.answer: Yes. Choose soft studio, dramatic spotlight, natural daylight, or custom setups.

items.question: How do credits work?
items.answer: Each re-light pass consumes credits based on resolution and adjustments. Iterate and export within your plan.
